snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client._.extended_inline_request_body(
    docs="docs",
    name="name",
    unique="unique",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client._.extended_inline_request_body(
        docs="docs",
        name="name",
        unique="unique",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
